one_time_description: Canada Class Action Water Settlement - non-recurring settlement revenue
economic_notes: Nation has investments in Red Bluff Developments, RBDC Trucking LLP, Lhtako Gas and Convenience Store Ltd., and 1305049 B.C. Ltd. accounted for using modified equity method. West Fraser Timber Mills revenue of $1,193,949 suggests active forestry/resource sector relationships.
notes: Nation uses modified equity method for 4 business entities (GBEs). Net financial position is net debt of $3,403,434. TCA Acquisitions Included in Expenses line is a negative adjustment of -$5,023,182 in expenses (capital items reclassified). Investments in Nation business entities shown as negative $1,444,445 (accumulated losses). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNHA + Gov Canada + CMHC + Province of BC + BC Gaming + BC Aboriginal Child Care + CCTC + SDNA + FNESC = $6,641,769. Current liabilities calculated as bank advances + accounts payable = $528,364 + $1,396,994 + $142,080 = $2,067,438. Silviculture deposits in restricted cash went to zero in 2023 from $115,103 in 2022.
